entries.replacement_plan: Split the mixed shell lane into atlas-owned ci lane execution and summary emission.
entries.notes: This step still mixes contract execution, docs drift checks, and secret scanning in workflow-local shell.

entries.replacement_plan: Move the mixed lint, diff, governance, and summary logic behind an atlas ci lane command.
Continue splitting workflow-local jq, python, grep, and count gates into atlas ci verify and ci lane commands.
Wrap the remaining supply-chain shell lane in a single atlas command surface.

entries.control_plane_command: cargo run --locked -q -p bijux-dev-atlas -- ci verify workflow-policy --format json
entries.replacement_plan: Use the atlas workflow-policy verifier as the single authoritative implementation.
Mirror dependency review policy in atlas before retiring the workflow-local third-party enforcement step.

entries.control_plane_command: cargo run --locked -q -p bijux-dev-atlas -- ci verify dependency-lock --allow-git --format json
entries.replacement_plan: Use the atlas dependency-lock verifier as the single changed-path gate.

entries.control_plane_command: cargo run --locked -q -p bijux-dev-atlas -- docs lint --format json
entries.replacement_plan: Keep docs linting in the atlas docs command surface.

entries.control_plane_command: cargo run --locked -q -p bijux-dev-atlas -- ci verify docs-preview --allow-subprocess --allow-write --format json
entries.replacement_plan: Use atlas docs-preview verification to build the site and validate canonical site output invariants.

entries.control_plane_command: cargo run --locked -q -p bijux-dev-atlas -- docs lint --format json
entries.replacement_plan: Keep docs linting in the atlas docs command surface.

entries.control_plane_command: cargo run --locked -q -p bijux-dev-atlas -- ci verify docs-preview --allow-subprocess --allow-write --format json
entries.replacement_plan: Use atlas docs-preview verification to build the site and validate canonical site output invariants.

entries.control_plane_command: cargo run --locked -q -p bijux-dev-atlas -- ci verify docs-diff --allow-git --allow-write --format json
entries.replacement_plan: Use atlas docs-diff verification to generate the docs diff summary artifact.

entries.control_plane_command: cargo run --locked -q -p bijux-dev-atlas -- ci verify docs-quality --allow-write --format json
entries.replacement_plan: Use atlas docs-quality verification to publish the committed docs coverage artifact into the run reports.
